title: Cognitive Behavioural Therapy (CBT)
blurb: Change unhelpful thought and behaviour patterns.
lead: CBT is one of the most researched talking therapies. It helps you notice how thoughts, feelings, and behaviours interact — and change the patterns that keep you stuck.

blocks.text: CBT is a structured, practical therapy based on the idea that our thoughts, feelings, and behaviours are linked. By identifying and testing unhelpful thoughts and gradually changing behaviour, people can break cycles that fuel anxiety, depression, and more.
It's usually short-term, skills-focused, and heavily evidence-based across many conditions. Much of it can be learned through free self-help guides.

resources.title: Free CBT self-help guides
resources.whyHere: Free downloadable CBT booklets for many issues.

resources.title: Free CBT worksheets, MP3s & guides
resources.whyHere: A large, genuinely free library of CBT self-help tools you can start today.
